releases.name: Release 3.4.3

releases.author: LincZero
releases.description:
English

- Feat
  - Added `strictTable` handler for use with table transposition
  - Added Codemirror online demo page (semi-complete, full implementation in next version)
- Enhance
  - Refactored code patterns and migrated to Obsidian API (passed secondary code review from Obsidian)
  - Refactored table-related handlers, encapsulated reusable code into `TableMap`
- Fix
  - Minimum auto-refresh interval `1000ms → 500ms`
  - Markmap rendering issues when formulas are present #177
  - Potential infinite refresh when notes self-reference specific blocks #171
  - `activityDiagram` handler fails when using `match` keyword instead of `switch` #168
  - Code block selectors with nested indentation not handling space prefixes correctly
  - Mobile edit button optimization #183 (pending verification)
- Docs
  - Improved multi-language support
  - Merged tables, fixed broken links, beautified documentation homepage

中文

- Feat
  - 新增 `strictTable` 处理器，用于配合表格转置使用
  - 在线演示页面添加 codemirror 在线 (半成品，等下版本完成)
- Enhance
  - 重构了一些代码写法和换用ob api (接受了一次obsidian的二次代码审查)
  - 重构了表格相关的处理器，封装复用部分代码 `TableMap`
- Fix
  - 最小自动刷新频率 `1000 -> 500ms`
  - markmap 带公式则渲染存在问题 #177
  - 笔记自己引用自己的部分段落时，可能存在无限刷新 #171
  - activityDiagram 处理器使用 `match` 关键字代替 `switch` 关键字则存在问题 #168
  - 代码块选择器被嵌套使用时，未能正确处理空格前缀
  - 移动端编辑按钮优化 #183 (待试验是否正确修复)
- Docs
  - 更好地支持多语言
  - 合并表格、一些链接的修复、文档主页美化
releases.name: 3.3.2 patch4

releases.author: LincZero
releases.description:
en

- BREAKCAHNGE
  - The processor list command `info` conflicts with `callout info`, and is renamed to `info_converter`.
  - Horizontal scrolling regular expression optimization: `/^scroll(\((\d+)\))?(T)?$/` -> `/^scroll(X)?(\((\d+)\))?$/`
- Features
  - Case study using the new processor `mdit2code` to resolve markdown-it-container nesting issues
- Enhancements
  - `mdit2code` will process `@` symbol as h1
  - Stop using markdown rendering for filenames in dir/dt processors (because filenames like `01. filename` would become block elements: lists)
- Fixes
  - Fixed malfunction of special `listtable|fold` combination (caused by previous version changes)
  - Fixed unrecognized trailing `/` when folder names in dir/dt processors contain trailing spaces
  - Fixed `2table|width` combination where the latter fails (unable to recognize tables converted from ab) #161
  - Fixed symbol recognition issue with `+-` in `callout __` processor
  - fix activityDiagram @J0HN50N133 
  - The refresh enhancement feature added in the previous version has failed.
- Styles
  - Hover cursor for tabs processor
- Refactors
  - Refactored CodeMirror decoration set code, **improved performance by reducing re-rendered sections when cursor enters/exits anyblock**
  - Optimized mermaid dependencies, reduced plugin size by using non-minified versions
  - New processor category: code-text class
  - Refactored markdown-it-container selector in app/markdown-it
    - Implemented allowlist/denylist mechanism
    - Allowed nesting

zh

- 破坏性修改
  - 处理器列表命令 `info` 与 `callout info` 冲突，更名为 `info_converter`
  - 横向滚动正则优化：`/^scroll(\((\d+)\))?(T)?$/` -> `/^scroll(X)?(\((\d+)\))?$/`
- 功能
  - 使用新处理器 mdit2code 解决 markdown-it-container 嵌套问题的案例
- 增强
  - mdit2code 会处理 @ 符为 h1
  - 不再使用markdown方式渲染 dir/dt 处理器的文件名 (因为 `01. 文件名` 这样的文件名会变成块元素: 列表)
- 修复
  - `listtable|fold` 的特殊组合失效 (上版本修改引起)
  - dir/dt 处理器的文件夹名后面有空格时，尾 `/` 无法被正常识别
  - `2table|width` 的组合，后者失效 (无法识别到ab转换过来的表格) #161
  - `callout __` 处理器的 `+-` 符识别存在问题
  - fix activityDiagram @J0HN50N133 
  - 上版本新增的刷新增强功能失效
- 样式
  - tabs 处理器的悬浮光标
- 重构
  - 重构了cm装饰集部分代码，**光标进出anyblock块时，减少了重渲染部分，提升了性能**
  - 优化了mermaid的依赖，减少了非min版的插件体积
  - 新的处理器组别: 代码文本类
  - 重构 app/markdown-it 版的 markdown-it-container 选择器
    - 使用黑白名单机制
    - 允许嵌套

---

上版本热修补丁 2025-05-11

- 修复: xQuote 处理器失效 #167
- 功能: 添加 callout xxx 处理器
- 功能: 添加 mdit2code 处理器

releases.author: LincZero
releases.description:
en

- ⚠️BREAKCHANGE
  - Some renaming
    - The `quote` handler is renamed to `addQuote`. The original one is no longer to add the quote block, but to add the quote block of the callout  (⚠️This item is mandatory; other suggestions)
    -  `X`->`x`, `Xcode` -> `xCode`, `Xquote`->`xQuote`
  - The warehouse name was modified and the address of the online interaction website was changed
- Feat
  - enhance the refresh module (⚠️ **beta, risk**, you can find data.json in the plugin file and modify `"enhance_refresh_time": 0,` to disable this feature)
    Impact: addClass(ab-super-width), node style #88, waterfall layout of cards #116
  - new processors: addList, xList, code2List, region2indent
  - new processor: list2pumlActivityDiagramText, list2pumlActivityDiagram @J0HN50N133
  - Simplify the callout syntax to reduce conflicts between the ab syntax and the mdit syntax. New alias: `(info|note|warning|caution|attention|error|danger|tip|hint|example|abstract|summary|tldr|quote|cite|todo|success|c heck|done)`
- Enhance
  - cursor delay issue when editing anyblock. The experience is better when using the cursor to cut in and out of anyblock blocks #142
  - app version `:::` selector enhancement @YiwangHuang
  - The optimization of the column `list2lt` `dir` processor, including: click area, dom structure, all collapse/expand button  #148
  - Some click interaction operations of the app/mdit version have been added
  - The document was refactored using 'mditABDemo' to make the source code of the document more concise
- Fix
  - Some bugs in the new version of vuepress have been resolved
  - Fixed #88 #116 through the enhanced refresh module
  - `trs` `exTable` dom struct error, and the bugs it causes #161
- Refactor
  - The code framework was restructured, and the monorepo, workflow and release process were changed #149 #153
  - Restructure the MarkdownIt sub-project. The old package of the MarkdownIt sub-project has been abandoned and changed to `markdown-it-any-block`
  - The dom structure change of `list2lt` `dir`
- Patch 2025-05-11
  - fix: `xQuote` invalid #167
  - feat: add `callout xxx` processor
  - feat: add `mdit2code` processor

zh

- ⚠️破坏性更新
  -  一些重命名
    - `quote` 处理器重命名为 `addQuote`。原来的不再是增加引用块，而是改为增加callout的quote块 （⚠️此项必须，其他建议）
    -  `X`->`x`, `Xcode` -> `xCode`, `Xquote`->`xQuote`
  - 修改了仓库名，更改了在线交互网站的地址
- 功能
  - 增强刷新模块（⚠️ **beta，风险**，可在插件文件中找到data.json并修改 `"enhance_refresh_time": 0,` 以关闭此功能）
      影响：addClass(ab-super-width)、node样式 #88、卡片的瀑布流布局 #116 
  - 新的处理器：addList、xList、code2List、region2indent
  - 新的处理器：puml活动图（list2pumlActivityDiagramText、list2pumlActivityDiagram）@J0HN50N133 
  - 简化callout语法，减少ab语法与mdit语法的冲突。新的别名：`(info|note|warning|caution|attention|error|danger|tip|hint|example|abstract|summary|tldr|quote|cite|todo|success|check|done)`
- 增强
  - 编辑 anyblock 时的光标延迟问题，使用光标上下切入anyblock块时体验更好 #142
  - app版本的 `:::` 选择器增强 @YiwangHuang 
  - 列表格/目录处理器的优化，包括：点击区域、dom结构、全部折叠/展开按钮 #148
  - app/mdit版本的一些点击交互操作追加
  - 用 `mditABDemo` 重构了文档，使文档源码更简洁
- 修复
  - 与新版 vuepress 的一些bug解决
  - 通过增强刷新模块修复的  #88 #116 
  - `trs` `exTable` dom 结构异常，以及其引起的bug #161
- 重构
  - 重构了代码框架，改monorepo，工作流与发布流程 #149 #153
  - 重构MarkdownIt子工程。废弃了 MarkdownIt 子工程的旧包，改为 `markdown-it-any-block`
  - `list2lt` `dir` 的dom结构变更
- 热修补丁 2025-05-11
  - 修复: `xQuote` 处理器失效 #167
  - 功能: 添加 `callout xxx` 处理器
  - 功能: 添加 `mdit2code` 处理器

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/17aeac82-0f6a-447d-974e-db294a8cfe20)
releases.name: 3.3.0 path-1

releases.author: LincZero
releases.description:
Emergency fix of critical bugs: Forcible refresh of the read mode may fail, causing the update t #140

紧急修复严重bug: 阅读模式强制刷新失效可能导致更新不及时 #140

releases.author: LincZero
releases.description:
en - Feat - addDiv processor supports adding multiple classes at the same time - Optimized scroll-x custom style for table creation - More `:::` alert block types - app version of `:::` selector @YiwangHuang - for easy - timeline of adapter https://forum-zh.obsidian.md/t/topic/38352/137 - mermaid related processors support mermaid header parameters - Fix - `:::` selector, `warn` overrides `warninig` flag issues - In the header and ':::' selector, is mistakenly terminated by the contents of the code block #131 - Refresh #138 indefinitely when a referenced file in the canvas references part of another file - slice An error occurred when the processor missed the second parameter - Refactor - Location of some code files changed - Workflow - Automatically compile min version (see note at bottom) - Added a separate repository for the min version for publishing to the plugin community, and for downloading using brat: https://github.com/any-block/obsidian-any-block-min/ zh - 功能 - addDiv处理器支持同时添加多个类 - 优化 scroll-x 自定义样式对表格的创始 - 更多的 `:::` alert块类型 - app版本的 `:::` 选择器 @YiwangHuang - 对easy-timeline的适配 https://forum-zh.obsidian.md/t/topic/38352/137 - mermaid相关的几个处理器支持mermaid头部参数 - 修复 - `:::` 选择器中，`warn` 覆盖 `warninig` 标识的问题 - 在标题和`:::`选择器中，会误被代码块内的内容终止 #131 - canvas中引用的文件里再引用其他文件的一部分时，无限刷新 #138 - slice 处理器缺失第二个参数时出错 - 重构 - 部分代码文件位置改动 - 工作流 - 自动编译min版本 (见底部注释) - 添加了用于发布到插件社区，和使用brat下载的min版独立仓库：https://github.com/any-block/obsidian-any-block-min/
min版本说明 (min version explain)
  • zh
    去除 mermaid、markmap、plantuml 相关功能和依赖，减少了体积和提升启动速度！（不使用这几个功能的建议用min版）手动安装时需重命名 `main-min.js` 为 `main.js` 并代替原来的 `main.js`
    提升幅度 (v3.2.1): 尺寸 8.82MB -> 262KB, 启动时间 424ms -> 30ms
  • en
    Remove mermaid, markmap, plantuml related functions and dependencies, reduced size and increased start-up speed! To manual installation, rename `main-min.js` to `main.js` and replace the original `main.js`
    Lifting range (v3.2.1) Size 8.82MB -> 262KB, Startup Time 424ms -> 30ms
